project_type: Python trading bot - Binance Alpha market automated trader with Feishu notifications
verification_instructions:
1. Install dependencies: pip install -r requirements.txt
2. Verify imports work: python -c 'import src'
3. Run main.py in dry-run or check mode: python main.py --check
4. Run tests: python -m pytest tests/ -v
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Python 3.9 available. Binance testnet API keys required for live testing but not for code validation.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - no existing contribution guidelines
key_patterns: Modular architecture with separate concerns: strategy, exchange API, notifications, storage, blacklist management. YAML config for all parameters. SQLite for persistence. Async-capable design for real-time market monitoring.
directory_structure:
binance-auto/ - root
  config.yaml - all configurable parameters
  main.py - entry point, runs bot continuously
  requirements.txt - dependencies
  src/ - all source modules
    strategy.py - trading strategy logic (signal detection, trailing stop, time stop-loss)
    exchange.py - Binance API wrapper (klines, orders, positions)
    notifier.py - Feishu webhook notifications (trade alerts, daily summary)
    storage.py - SQLite database operations (trade records, profit tracking)
    blacklist.py - blacklist management (consecutive losses, auto-remove)
    models.py - data models (Trade, Position, Signal)
  tests/ - test files
  logs/ - log files
  data/ - SQLite database
